name: AppLovin Corporation
description: AppLovin Corporation builds technologies that help developers grow their businesses. The company provides an end-to-end software platform with solutions for creators to market, monetize, analyze, and publish their apps. Its software solutions include AppDiscovery, an AI-powered marketing software that matches advertiser demand with publisher supply; MAX, an in-app bidding software; and Adjust, an analytics platform. AppLovin also operates a portfolio of global first-party mobile games.
